channel_office365.module.title: Microsoft 365
channel_office365.page.title: Microsoft 365
channel_office365.empty.title: No Microsoft 365 account connected
channel_office365.empty.description: Connect your Microsoft 365 account to sync calendar events and emails to Activities.
channel_office365.disconnect.confirm: Disconnect Microsoft 365? All sync will stop.
channel_office365.sync.success: Sync started — events will appear in a moment

channel_office365.setup.title: Azure App Registration required
channel_office365.setup.description: Configure Client ID and Secret in Settings → Integrations → Microsoft 365 before connecting.
channel_office365.setup.scopes: Required API permissions: Calendars.ReadWrite, Mail.ReadWrite, User.Read, offline_access.
channel_office365.capability.calendar.di: Enable to sync calendar events to Activities.
channel_office365.capability.mail.label: Email Sync
channel_office365.errors.missingMailScop: Mail.ReadWrite scope not granted — reconnect first
channel_office365.errors.mailSyncFailed: Failed to enqueue mail sync job
channel_office365.capability.mail.disabl: Enable to sync Inbox + Sent Items to Activities.
channel_office365.capability.mail.requir: To enable email sync, click "Reconnect" and approve mailbox access in Microsoft 365.
channel_office365.mailSync.success: Email sync started — emails will appear in a moment
channel_office365.syncFrom.label: Sync from:
channel_office365.emailWindow.hint: Enabling syncs the last 1 day of mail. To fetch older messages, pick a date and click Sync.
